params.value: SELECT Id, Name, OwnerId, Owner.Name, AccountId, Account.Name, IsWon, StageName, Amount, dateTimestampContractreceived__c, CloseDate, RecordType.Name FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = true AND CloseDate >= LAST_N_DAYS:90 AND OwnerId IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE','005W7000005SxezIAC','005W7000006RaC1IAK','005W7000006fJw5IAE','005W70000064mKSIAY','005W7000006fJrFIAU','0059L000000JKGSQA4','005W70000071E6XIAU') ORDER BY OwnerId, CloseDate DESC LIMIT 2000

CUSTOM_ACTION.path: query/?q=SELECT Id, Name, OwnerId, Owner.Name, AccountId, Account.Name, IsWon, StageName, Amount, dateTimestampContractreceived__c, CloseDate, RecordType.Name FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = true AND CloseDate >= LAST_N_DAYS:90 AND OwnerId IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE','005W7000005SxezIAC','005W7000006RaC1IAK','005W7000006fJw5IAE','005W70000064mKSIAY','005W7000006fJrFIAU','0059L000000JKGSQA4','005W70000071E6XIAU') ORDER BY OwnerId, CloseDate DESC LIMIT 2000
